title: Our New Website Is Live
excerpt: We've just launched a brand new home for Eclectic Seals Int'l online, with a full portfolio of our recent work.
body: We're excited to launch our new website. It brings together our services, our project portfolio, and the easiest way yet to reach our team for a consultation or quote. We'll be using this page to share project updates, completed work, and behind-the-scenes moments as we go — check back often.

title: Now Offering Swimming Pool Construction & Maintenance
excerpt: Our newest service line covers everything from structural pool builds to ongoing water treatment and upkeep.
body: We've expanded our services to include full swimming pool construction and maintenance — structural build, tiling and finishing, filtration and plumbing, water treatment, and routine upkeep. Whether you're building new or need a maintenance partner for an existing pool, our team can now handle it end to end.

title: Project Complete: Republic of Liberia Embassy Renovation
excerpt: A full renovation of the Liberia Embassy in Central Area, Abuja, taken from its original condition to a refreshed, modern finish.
body: We're proud to have completed a full renovation of the Republic of Liberia Embassy in Central Area, Abuja. The project took the building from its original condition through to a refreshed, modern finish. See more from this project, along with the rest of our portfolio, on our Projects page.

title: Meet The Team Behind Every Build
excerpt: A quick introduction to the people who plan, manage and deliver every Eclectic Seals Int'l project.
body: Every project we deliver is the result of a team working closely together, from initial consultation through to handover. Read more about our leadership team on our About page.
